name: Aventus
description: Aventus by Creed celebrates strength and success, opening with smoky pineapple over birch — arguably the most hyped men's fragrance of the modern era.

name: Green Irish Tweed
description: Green Irish Tweed is Creed's timeless gentleman's classic: crisp violet leaf and green freshness over warm sandalwood, famously worn by movie stars.

name: Silver Mountain Water
description: Inspired by alpine streams, Silver Mountain Water by Creed pairs metallic green tea and blackcurrant into a sparkling clean scent.

name: Viking
description: Viking by Creed is a fiery peppery rose built for bold seafarers, blending spice and woods with a fresh minty edge.

name: Sauvage
description: Sauvage by Dior is the world's best-selling men's fragrance: raw bergamot and pepper over a booming Ambroxan base, inspired by wide-open desert skies.

name: Dior Homme Intense
description: Dior Homme Intense wraps powdery iris in lavender and cedar — a suave, seductive signature that fans call the ultimate date-night scent from Dior.

name: Fahrenheit
description: Fahrenheit by Dior shocked the 80s with its gasoline-tinged violet leaf and leather, and remains one of perfumery's most recognizable creations.

name: Miss Dior
description: Miss Dior is the house of Dior's romantic centerpiece, a silky rose and peony bouquet softened with creamy vanilla musk.

name: J'adore
description: J'adore by Dior is a golden liquid bouquet of jasmine, ylang-ylang and rose — a modern icon of glamorous femininity fronted by decades of star-studded ads.

name: Bleu de Chanel
description: Bleu de Chanel is the modern blue-fragrance blueprint from Chanel: citrus and incense polished into an effortlessly versatile signature.

name: N°5
description: N°5 by Chanel, born in 1921, is the most famous perfume ever made — sparkling aldehydes over an abstract floral heart.

name: Coco Mademoiselle
description: Coco Mademoiselle is Chanel's spirited orange-and-patchouli chypre, a confident modern classic for the free-spirited.

name: Allure Homme Sport
description: Allure Homme Sport by Chanel blends juicy orange with clean musk and tonka — the elegant way to smell sporty.

name: Chance
description: Chance by Chanel spins luck into a round bottle: peppery florals swirling over soft patchouli and musk.

name: Tobacco Vanille
description: Tobacco Vanille by Tom Ford is a cozy gentleman's club in a bottle: pipe tobacco drenched in boozy vanilla and spice.

name: Oud Wood
description: Oud Wood introduced countless Westerners to oud — Tom Ford's smooth, creamy take on the precious resinous wood.

name: Black Orchid
description: Black Orchid launched the house of Tom Ford with a decadent dark blend of truffle, chocolate and mysterious florals.

name: Lost Cherry
description: Lost Cherry by Tom Ford is a viral gourmand of liqueur-soaked cherries and almond that spawned an entire trend of cherry scents.

name: Ombré Leather
description: Ombré Leather channels Tom Ford's vision of the American West: supple leather dusted with cardamom over warm amber.

name: Fucking Fabulous
description: Provocatively named by Tom Ford, Fucking Fabulous pairs buttery leather with almond and lavender for a scent as brash as its label.

name: La Nuit de l'Homme
description: La Nuit de l'Homme by Yves Saint Laurent is the internet's favorite date-night recommendation: soft cardamom and cedar with smoldering restraint.

name: Y Eau de Parfum
description: Y Eau de Parfum by Yves Saint Laurent stacks crisp apple and sage over sweet amberwood — a crowd-pleasing modern generalist.

name: Libre
description: Libre by Yves Saint Laurent fuses French lavender with Moroccan orange blossom, a statement of freedom in a gold-trimmed bottle.

name: Black Opium
description: Black Opium by Yves Saint Laurent is an espresso-shot gourmand of coffee and vanilla wrapped in glittering rock-chic packaging.

name: Tuxedo
description: Tuxedo by Yves Saint Laurent dresses spicy violet and patchouli in black tie, honoring the house's iconic Le Smoking suit.

name: Acqua di Giò
description: Acqua di Giò by Giorgio Armani bottled the Mediterranean in 1996 and became the defining aquatic fragrance of a generation.

name: Acqua di Giò Profumo
description: Acqua di Giò Profumo deepened Giorgio Armani's marine classic with incense and patchouli; its discontinuation made it a cult treasure.

name: Armani Code
description: Armani Code is Giorgio Armani's smooth evening seducer, weaving star anise and olive blossom into sweet tonka warmth.

name: Sì
description: Sì by Giorgio Armani says yes to blackcurrant nectar poured over modern chypre elegance — a red-carpet staple.

name: Eros
description: Eros by Versace is the god of love in turquoise glass: icy mint and apple crashing into creamy vanilla and tonka.

name: Dylan Blue
description: Dylan Blue channels Versace's Mediterranean spirit into a peppery aquatic with a distinctive musky drydown.

name: Bright Crystal
description: Bright Crystal by Versace sparkles with pomegranate and dewy peony — a luminous crowd-pleaser in a jeweled pink bottle.

name: 1 Million
description: 1 Million by Paco Rabanne pours cinnamon, leather and swagger into a gold-bar bottle that defined late-2000s nightlife.

name: Invictus
description: Invictus by Paco Rabanne is victory in a trophy-shaped bottle — a sweet marine scent built for locker-room champions.

name: Phantom
description: Phantom by Paco Rabanne arrives in a robot-shaped bottle, mixing energizing lavender and lemon with creamy vanilla.

name: Lady Million
description: Lady Million is Paco Rabanne's diamond-shaped answer to its golden bestseller: honeyed white florals with a wink.

name: Le Male
description: Le Male by Jean Paul Gaultier put a sailor's torso on every dresser: barbershop lavender and mint melting into sweet vanilla.

name: Ultra Male
description: Ultra Male cranks Jean Paul Gaultier's classic to eleven with juicy pear and dark licorice — a club fragrance legend.

name: Le Male Le Parfum
description: Le Male Le Parfum sends Jean Paul Gaultier's sailor east with cardamom, iris and an opulent vanilla drydown.

name: Scandal
description: Scandal by Jean Paul Gaultier drips honey and beeswax over blood orange, topped by a can-can legs cap that lives up to the name.

name: Shalimar
description: Shalimar by Guerlain, created in 1925 as an ode to eternal love, practically invented the oriental vanilla genre.

name: L'Homme Idéal
description: L'Homme Idéal is Guerlain's witty formula for the ideal man: amaretto almond sharpened with leather and woods.

name: Mon Guerlain
description: Mon Guerlain celebrates modern femininity with Carla lavender and Tahitian vanilla, fronted by Angelina Jolie for Guerlain.

name: L'Instant de Guerlain pour Homme
description: L'Instant de Guerlain pour Homme hides bitter cocoa beneath citrus — a connoisseur favorite whose Eau Extreme version is worshipped online.

name: Terre d'Hermès
description: Terre d'Hermès grounds sparkling orange in flint and vetiver — Hermès' meditation on the bond between man and earth.

name: Un Jardin sur le Nil
description: Un Jardin sur le Nil sketches a garden on the Nile for Hermès, all green mango and lotus in watercolor lightness.

name: H24
description: H24 is Hermès' futuristic take on masculine freshness: steamed narcissus and sage with a warm-iron metallic twist.

name: Uomo Born in Roma
description: Uomo Born in Roma mixes Valentino's Roman heritage with streetwear energy: bright ginger over triple-distilled vanilla.

name: Donna Born in Roma
description: Donna Born in Roma pairs a trio of jasmines with bourbon vanilla — Valentino couture reimagined for the streets of Rome.

name: Valentino Uomo Intense
description: Valentino Uomo Intense drapes powdery iris over plush leather, a velvet-gloved Italian evening scent from Valentino.

name: Luna Rossa Carbon
description: Luna Rossa Carbon fuses Prada's racing-yacht DNA with metallic lavender and smoky minerals — a sleek modern uniform.

name: L'Homme Prada
description: L'Homme Prada layers iris and neroli into a clean powdery signature, quietly confident like the house of Prada itself.

name: Paradoxe
description: Paradoxe by Prada bottles contradiction — a neroli floral that is simultaneously airy and enveloping, in a triangle flacon.

name: Baccarat Rouge 540
description: Baccarat Rouge 540, created by Maison Francis Kurkdjian for the crystal maker's anniversary, became the most imitated luxury scent of the decade with its airy saffron-amber glow.

name: Grand Soir
description: Grand Soir is Maison Francis Kurkdjian's golden evening in Paris: resinous amber and vanilla that smolders for hours.

name: Aqua Universalis
description: Aqua Universalis is Maison Francis Kurkdjian's idea of fresh laundry in the sun — luminous citrus and clean musk for everyone.

name: Oud Satin Mood
description: Oud Satin Mood drapes Maison Francis Kurkdjian's oud in rose and vanilla satin — opulence measured in meters of fabric.

name: Layton
description: Layton by Parfums de Marly crowns crisp apple and lavender with spiced vanilla — the modern royal court's crowd-pleaser.

name: Herod
description: Herod by Parfums de Marly is sweet pipe tobacco and vanilla fit for a king's study, rich yet remarkably wearable.

name: Pegasus
description: Pegasus flies Parfums de Marly's winged-horse crest on a cloud of almond and heliotrope powder.

name: Delina
description: Delina is Parfums de Marly's pink-bottled phenomenon: rhubarb-laced Turkish rose that took over perfume social media.

name: Naxos
description: Naxos from Xerjoff's Italica line drizzles Sicilian honey over tobacco and lavender — dessert and cigar in one.

name: Erba Pura
description: Erba Pura by Xerjoff is a fruit basket exploding over white musk, notorious for its nuclear projection.

name: Alexandria II
description: Alexandria II is Xerjoff's regal oud-rose monument, often cited as the pinnacle of the niche apple-oud style.

name: Khamrah
description: Khamrah by Lattafa is the budget gourmand sensation: boozy dates, cinnamon and vanilla rivaling bottles ten times its price.

name: Asad
description: Asad means lion, and this Lattafa release roars with peppery coffee and amber inspired by a famous Dior flanker.

name: Fakhar Black
description: Fakhar Black gives Lattafa's take on the popular Y-style fresh-sweet profile at a fraction of designer cost.

name: Club de Nuit Intense Man
description: Club de Nuit Intense Man is Armaf's famously smoky homage to a certain celebrated niche pineapple scent, at pocket-money price.

name: Odyssey Mandarin Sky
description: Odyssey Mandarin Sky by Armaf splashes candied mandarin over warm vanilla, a joyful budget summer-evening pick.

name: Spicebomb Extreme
description: Spicebomb Extreme by Viktor & Rolf detonates cinnamon, tobacco and vanilla — the archetypal cold-weather grenade.

name: Flowerbomb
description: Flowerbomb by Viktor & Rolf is an explosion of sugared flowers over patchouli that has anchored perfume counters since 2005.

name: La Vie Est Belle
description: La Vie Est Belle by Lancôme spreads iris-praline happiness worldwide — one of the best-selling women's perfumes of its era.

name: Idôle
description: Idôle by Lancôme pours a dewy modern rose into the world's slimmest bottle, made by an all-female perfumer team.

name: Angel
description: Angel by Mugler invented the gourmand category in 1992, colliding cotton candy and chocolate with earthy patchouli in a star-shaped bottle.

name: Alien
description: Alien by Mugler beams solar jasmine over glowing amber from a purple talisman bottle — instantly recognizable from across a room.

name: A*Men
description: A*Men by Mugler dares men to wear chocolate, coffee and tar in a rubber-clad star — a polarizing gourmand pioneer.

name: Gentleman Eau de Parfum
description: Gentleman Eau de Parfum by Givenchy tailors powdery iris and black vanilla into a modern dinner-jacket scent.

name: L'Interdit
description: L'Interdit revives the perfume Givenchy made for Audrey Hepburn as a white-floral thriller with a dark earthy underside.

name: CK One
description: CK One made history in 1994 as Calvin Klein's shared unisex scent — a grunge-era statement of clean citrus minimalism.

name: Eternity for Men
description: Eternity for Men by Calvin Klein pairs herbal lavender freshness with quiet sandalwood — a 90s office classic still going strong.

name: The Most Wanted
description: The Most Wanted by Azzaro loads cardamom and fiery amber into a gunmetal barrel — nightlife ammunition, plain and simple.

name: Wanted by Night
description: Wanted by Night is Azzaro's spiced tobacco outlaw, blending cinnamon-mandarin warmth for cold city evenings.

name: Chrome
description: Chrome by Azzaro is liquid aluminum freshness — a lemony 90s aquatic passed down from fathers to sons.

name: Gypsy Water
description: Gypsy Water romanticizes Byredo's vision of Romani campfires: pine needles, incense and soft vanilla in Scandinavian minimalism.

name: Bal d'Afrique
description: Bal d'Afrique toasts 1920s Parisian-African nightlife for Byredo with neon marigold, violet and vetiver.

name: Mojave Ghost
description: Mojave Ghost by Byredo drifts like a desert flower apparition — sheer ambrette and magnolia over ghostly woods.

name: Santal 33
description: Santal 33 by Le Labo became the unofficial scent of Brooklyn and beyond — pickle-y sandalwood and leather that everyone recognizes.

name: Another 13
description: Another 13, made by Le Labo for a fashion magazine, is skin-scent ambroxan and musk perfected.

name: Rose 31
description: Rose 31 de-genders the rose for Le Labo, roughing it up with cumin, smoke and woods.

name: Philosykos
description: Philosykos by Diptyque is the definitive fig fragrance — the whole tree, leaf to bark, on a Greek hillside.

name: Tam Dao
description: Tam Dao meditates on creamy sandalwood, Diptyque's homage to Indochinese temple forests.

name: Side Effect
description: Side Effect by Initio swirls rum, cinnamon and tobacco into an intoxicating after-midnight elixir.

name: Oud for Greatness
description: Oud for Greatness modernizes oud with cool lavender and saffron, powering Initio to niche stardom.

name: Reflection Man
description: Reflection Man polishes white florals to a mirror sheen — Amouage's serene Omani take on effortless elegance.

name: Interlude Man
description: Interlude Man is Amouage's controlled chaos: a roaring bonfire of incense, oregano and amber not for the faint-hearted.

name: Jubilation XXV
description: Jubilation XXV celebrates Amouage's 25th anniversary with blackberry-laced incense — frequently called the house's masterpiece.

name: Explorer
description: Explorer by Montblanc offers a wallet-friendly ticket to the smoky-fruity niche style, packed in an adventurer's flask.

name: Legend
description: Legend by Montblanc is a dependable fresh fougère — lavender and pineapple smoothed into everyday confidence.

name: Polo Blue
description: Polo Blue splashes cucumber-melon freshness across Ralph Lauren's all-American sailing canvas.

name: Polo
description: The original green-bottle Polo from Ralph Lauren is a piney, tobacco-leather time capsule of 1970s masculinity.

name: Good Girl
description: Good Girl by Carolina Herrera struts in a stiletto-shaped bottle, balancing bright tuberose against dark coffee and cocoa.

name: Bad Boy
description: Bad Boy answers Carolina Herrera's stiletto with a lightning-bolt bottle of peppery cocoa-tonka mischief.

name: 212 VIP Men
description: 212 VIP Men mixes a frozen-vodka-and-lime party starter for Carolina Herrera's Manhattan nightlife crowd.

name: Wood Sage & Sea Salt
description: Wood Sage & Sea Salt bottles a windswept British beach for Jo Malone London — driftwood, salt spray and herbs.

name: English Pear & Freesia
description: English Pear & Freesia captures orchard ripeness for Jo Malone London, juicy pear wrapped in white petals.

name: Hacivat
description: Hacivat is Nishane's Istanbul-born pineapple chypre, widely praised as sharper and brighter than its famous inspiration.

name: Ani
description: Ani honors an ancient Armenian city with Nishane's gingered vanilla that radiates warmth for hours.

name: Light Blue
description: Light Blue by Dolce & Gabbana is the Mediterranean summer standard: crisp Sicilian lemon and green apple on a Capri breeze.

name: The One for Men
description: The One for Men made warm ginger-tobacco elegance mainstream for Dolce & Gabbana — a red-carpet regular ever since.

name: K by Dolce & Gabbana
description: K crowns the everyday king for Dolce & Gabbana with zesty blood orange and a crisp herbal finish.

name: Hero
description: Hero by Burberry gallops through cedar forests — a spare, confident woody-fresh fronted by a horse-riding campaign.

name: Her
description: Her by Burberry pours London-cool berry jam over soft musk — gourmand fruitiness with a wink.

name: Chloé Eau de Parfum
description: Chloé Eau de Parfum is the house of Chloé's signature powdery rose, effortlessly Parisian in its pleated bottle.

name: Nomade
description: Nomade sends Chloé's free spirit traveling with mirabelle plum over a classic mossy chypre base.

name: Bloom
description: Bloom floods Gucci's porcelain-print bottle with a hothouse of tuberose and jasmine in full flower.

name: Guilty Pour Homme
description: Guilty Pour Homme is Gucci's rebellious lavender-citrus for nights you'd rather not explain the next morning.

name: Love, Don't Be Shy
description: Love, Don't Be Shy by Kilian is marshmallow and orange blossom whipped into couture candy — famously a celebrity favorite.

name: Black Phantom
description: Black Phantom pours Kilian's pirate-worthy blend of rum, coffee and dark chocolate into a skull-etched bottle.

name: Halfeti
description: Halfeti by Penhaligon's honors Turkey's black roses with a plush rose-oud wrapped in British eccentricity.

name: Boss Bottled
description: Boss Bottled has suited up professionals since 1998 — Hugo Boss's apple-cinnamon handshake in a bottle.

name: The Scent
description: The Scent introduces exotic maninka fruit over leather — Hugo Boss engineering seduction by the book.

name: Elysium Pour Homme
description: Elysium Pour Homme is Roja Parfums' deluxe blue fragrance — a dazzling citrus cocktail engineered to smell expensive.

name: Enigma Pour Homme
description: Enigma Pour Homme swirls cognac, tobacco and vanilla into Roja Parfums' velvet-smoking-jacket masterpiece.

name: For Her
description: For Her built Narciso Rodriguez's entire house identity on one perfect heart of radiant musk.

name: L'Eau d'Issey Pour Homme
description: L'Eau d'Issey Pour Homme distills water itself for Issey Miyake — yuzu and lily minimalism that defined 90s freshness.

name: Cool Water
description: Cool Water by Davidoff crashed like a wave over 1988 and invented the modern aquatic category overnight.

name: Colonia
description: Colonia has embodied Acqua di Parma's sunlit Italian elegance since 1916 — the eau de cologne perfected.

name: Fierce
description: Fierce is the scent Abercrombie & Fitch pumped through its stores for decades — instantly recognizable mall-era nostalgia.

name: Original Green Wood
description: Original Green Wood by Dsquared2 walks a rain-soaked forest trail of citrus, violet leaf and vetiver.

name: Vibrant Leather
description: Vibrant Leather is Zara's famous budget nod to a certain Parisian citrus-leather bestseller, made with the same perfumer's touch.

name: L'Homme
description: L'Homme by Yves Saint Laurent is polite gingery charm in a gold column — a compliment-getter for daily wear since 2006.

name: Dior Homme Parfum
description: Dior Homme Parfum pours molten iris over dark leather — the house of Dior at its most opulent and brooding.

name: Égoïste
description: Égoïste by Chanel is rosewood, rose and sandalwood with a devilish streak — advertised with slamming shutters and a famous grudge.

name: Neroli Portofino
description: Neroli Portofino splashes the Italian Riviera across Tom Ford's blue Private Blend bottle — luxury sunbathing in scent form.

name: Royal Oud
description: Royal Oud is Creed's polished, barely-there take on oud — more marble palace hallway than smoky souk.

name: Cedrat Boise
description: Cedrat Boise by Mancera is the niche-adjacent workhorse: candied lemon over woods with legendary longevity.

name: Red Tobacco
description: Red Tobacco is Mancera's autumn cannonball — cinnamon-apple tobacco smoke that fills a room in seconds.

name: Imagination
description: Imagination steeps black tea in sparkling citrus for Louis Vuitton — an airy luxury refresher with couture polish.

name: Ombre Nomade
description: Ombre Nomade is Louis Vuitton's desert-crossing oud — dense smoke and raspberry embers built for grand entrances.

name: Megaflower
description: Megaflower by Hermetica blooms as an alcohol-free molecular bouquet — futuristic florals engineered in Paris.

name: Man in Black
description: Man in Black dresses Bvlgari's Roman god in rum-soaked leather and tuberose — a bold evening classic.

name: Aqva Pour Homme
description: Aqva Pour Homme dives into Mediterranean seaweed and mandarin — Bvlgari's mineral-rich answer to the aquatic genre.

name: Irish Leather
description: Irish Leather saddles Memo Paris' travel-inspired collection with green mate and fresh leather straight off the Irish plains.

name: Glorious
description: Glorious by Boadicea the Victorious charges into the pineapple-birch arena with British ceremonial armor and extrait strength.

name: Not a Perfume
description: Not a Perfume by Juliette Has a Gun is exactly one molecule — Cetalox — worn alone as a clean, hypoallergenic skin scent.

name: Fat Electrician
description: Fat Electrician is Etat Libre d'Orange's cheeky creamy vetiver — a blue-collar name for a surprisingly plush scent.

name: X for Men
description: X for Men carries Clive Christian's crown-stoppered opulence — spiced woods blended with no expense spared.

name: Portrait of a Lady
description: Portrait of a Lady is Frederic Malle's monumental rose-patchouli, widely considered one of the greatest perfumes of the 21st century.

name: Musc Ravageur
description: Musc Ravageur lives up to its ravaging name — Frederic Malle's animalic musk and vanilla seduction with zero florals.

name: Ambre Sultan
description: Ambre Sultan crowned Serge Lutens the king of ambers — resins and desert herbs glowing like embers.

name: Chergui
description: Chergui names the Moroccan desert wind, and Serge Lutens fills it with honeyed hay and tobacco warmth.

name: Flower by Kenzo
description: Flower by Kenzo waves its poppy-topped bottle as a symbol of urban poetry — powdery violet softness against city concrete.

name: Toy Boy
description: Toy Boy hides Moschino's spicy modern rose inside a pink teddy-bear bottle that men were told they couldn't pull off.

name: La Vie est Belle L'Eau de Parfum
Himalaya
description: Himalaya by Creed is a Amber Woody fragrance for men. Himalaya was launched in 2002. Himalaya was created by Olivier Creed and Erwin Creed. Top notes are Calabrian bergamot, Grapefruit and Sicilian Lemon; middle note is Sandalwood; base notes are Musk, Ambergris and Cedar.

name: Candy
description: Prada Candy by Prada is a Amber Vanilla fragrance for women. Prada Candy was launched in 2011. The nose behind this fragrance is Daniela (Roche) Andrier. Top note is Caramel; middle notes are Powdery Notes and Musk; base notes are Benzoin and Vanilla.

name: F by Ferragamo pour Homme Black
Noir
description: Noir by Tom Ford is a Amber Woody fragrance for men. Noir was launched in 2012. The nose behind this fragrance is Olivier Gillotin. Top notes are Violet, Pink Pepper, Caraway, Bergamot and Verbena; middle notes are Tuscan Iris, Bulgarian Rose, Black Pepper, Nutmeg, Geranium and Clary Sage; base notes are Indonesian Patchouli Leaf, Amber, Vanilla, Civet, Leather, Opoponax, Benzoin, Vetiver and Styrax.

name: L.12.12 Blanc Eau de Lacoste L.12.12 Blanc
Enigma pour Homme Creation-E pour Homme
Myslf
description: MYSLF by Yves Saint Laurent is a Aromatic fragrance for men. This is a new fragrance. MYSLF was launched in 2023. The nose behind this fragrance is Christophe Raynaud. Top notes are Calabrian bergamot and Bergamot; middle note is Tunisian Orange Blossom; base notes are Ambrofix™ and Patchouli.

name: Pour Monsieur A Gentleman's Cologne / For Men
La Nuit de L'Homme Le Parfum
Original Santal
description: Original Santal by Creed is a Amber Woody fragrance for women and men. Original Santal was launched in 2005. Original Santal was created by Olivier Creed, Erwin Creed and Pierre Bourdon. Top notes are Juniper Berries, Coriander, Ginger, Rosemary, Bergamot and Mandarin Orange; middle notes are Sandalwood, Lavender, Orange Blossom and Geranium; base notes are Tonka Bean, Musk, Cedar and Oakmoss.

name: Irisss
description: Irisss by Xerjoff is a Floral fragrance for women. Irisss was launched in 2008. Top notes are Carrot Seeds, Carnation and Bergamot; middle notes are Iris, Violet, Rose, Ylang-Ylang and Jasmine; base notes are Musk, Vetiver, Benzoin, Cedar and Incense.

name: Cassili
description: Cassili by Parfums de Marly is a Amber Floral fragrance for women. Cassili was launched in 2019. Top notes are Red Currant, Floral Notes and Bulgarian Rose; middle notes are Plum, Frangipani, Petalia and Mimosa; base notes are Vanilla, Tonka Bean and Sandalwood.

name: Safanad
description: Safanad by Parfums de Marly is a Floral fragrance for women. Safanad was launched in 2013. The nose behind this fragrance is Fabrice Pellegrin. Top notes are Pear and Orange; middle notes are Orange Blossom, Ylang-Ylang and Iris; base notes are Vanilla, Amber and Sandalwood.

name: N°19
description: Chanel N°19 by Chanel is a Floral Green fragrance for women. Chanel N°19 was launched in 1970. The nose behind this fragrance is Henri Robert. Top notes are Galbanum, Hiacynth, Bergamot and Neroli; middle notes are Iris, Orris Root, Rose, Lily-of-the-Valley, Narcissus, Jasmine and Ylang-Ylang; base notes are Oakmoss, Vetiver, Leather, Cedar, Musk and Sandalwood.

name: Bois Mystérieux Songe d'un Bois d'Été
Collectible PHI - Une Rose de Kandahar
Métallique
description: Metallique by Tom Ford is a Floral Aldehyde fragrance for women. Metallique was launched in 2019. Top notes are Aldehydes, Pink Pepper and Bergamot; middle notes are Heliotrope, Hawthorn and Lily-of-the-Valley; base notes are Vanilla, Ambrette (Musk Mallow), Peru Balsam and Sandalwood.

name: L'Homme Idéal Intense L'Homme Idéal L'Intense
Les Royales Exclusives - Spice and Wood
Athalia
description: Athalia by Parfums de Marly is a Floral Woody Musk fragrance for women. Athalia was launched in 2016. Top note is Orange Blossom; middle note is Iris; base notes are White Musk and Amber.

name: Kokorico
description: Kokorico by Jean Paul Gaultier is a Woody Aromatic fragrance for men. Kokorico was launched in 2011. Kokorico was created by Olivier Cresp and Annick Menardo. Top note is Fig Leaf; middle notes are Cacao and Patchouli; base notes are Vetiver and Virginia Cedar.

name: A Taste of Heaven Absinthe Verte
M7
description: M7 by Yves Saint Laurent is a Amber Woody fragrance for men. M7 was launched in 2002. M7 was created by Jacques Cavallier and Alberto Morillas. Top notes are Rosemary, Mandarin Orange and Bergamot; middle notes are Agarwood (Oud) and Vetiver; base notes are Amber and Musk.

name: Classique
description: Classique by Jean Paul Gaultier is a Amber Floral fragrance for women. Classique was launched in 1993. The nose behind this fragrance is Jacques Cavallier. Top notes are Orange Blossom, Star Anise, Rose, Mandarin Orange, Pear and Bergamot; middle notes are Ylang-Ylang, Ginger, Orchid, Iris, Tuberose and Plum; base notes are Vanilla, Amber, Musk, Cinnamon and Sandalwood.

name: Valentino Uomo Born In Roma Yellow Dream
Rocabar
description: Rocabar by Hermès is a Woody Spicy fragrance for men. Rocabar was launched in 1998. The nose behind this fragrance is Gilles Romey. Top notes are Cedar Essence, Juniper, Coriander, Lemon and Bergamot; middle notes are Italian Cypress, Cedar, Cardamom, Carnation and Violet; base notes are Canada Balsam, Benzoin, Oakmoss, Vanilla and Patchouli.

name: Equipage
description: Equipage by Hermès is a Amber Fougere fragrance for men. Equipage was launched in 1970. The nose behind this fragrance is Guy Robert. Top notes are Brazilian Rosewood, Nutmeg Flower, Clary Sage, Aldehydes, Bergamot, Orange, Tarragon and Marjoram; middle notes are Carnation, Pine Tree Needles, Cinnamon, Lily-of-the-Valley, Jasmine, Hyssop and Liatris; base notes are Oakmoss, Vetiver, Patchouli, Tonka Bean, Musk, Vanilla and Amber.

name: Guilty Elixir de Parfum pour Homme
Homme
description: Homme by Xerjoff is a Woody fragrance for men. Homme was launched in 2007. Top notes are Spices and Citruses; middle notes are Lavender, Clove and Ylang-Ylang; base notes are Leather, Vetiver and Woodsy Notes.

name: Collection Grands Crus - Assam of India
Pure eVe - Just Pure Pure Virgin
Comme une Evidence L'Eau de Parfum

description: Viking Cologne by Creed is a Aromatic Fougere fragrance for men. Viking Cologne was launched in 2021. Viking Cologne was created by Olivier Creed and Erwin Creed.
